title: Pricene
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Pricene |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]This article assumes that [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Pricene is [[Human/Legends|Human]] due to his using the term "[[Alien/Legends|alien]] fuzzballs." |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]]''[[Flashpoint! Brak Sector]]'' |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Lant Mining Corporation]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Erils, those alien fuzzballs at the starport put us off schedule. Must have been the slowest loaders I've ever seen. Any chance of saving time in hyperspace?''"
"''Yes, but it increases the risk factor by .22 for a total of .35…''"
"''Which exceeds LMC policy and is therefore prohibited.|Captain Pricene and [[Erils]]|}} '''Pricene''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] for the [[Lant Mining Corporation]]. He had been assigned to command of the [[LMC Hauler One-Six]], the lead ship of [[Convoy LMC-55c]], when it was captured by an [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] and a squadron of [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]]. ==Sources== *''[[Flashpoint! Brak Sector]]'' {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Lant Mining Corporation employees]] [[Category:Males]]
